title: Peppy Silky Light Saudi Grape Crumble
description: A mediterranean-friendly dessert featuring a blend of aromatic spices and grapes folded into a light crumb mixture for a delightful twist on traditional Middle Eastern desserts.

ingredients.name: 2 cups fresh or frozen grapes
ingredients.notes: crushed and squeezed to release juices

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup honey
ingredients.amount: stirred into the grape mixture for sweetness

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground cumin
ingredients.notes: adds a warm, earthy flavor to complement the sweetness of the grapes

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground cardamom
ingredients.notes: aromatic spice that enhances the overall taste profile

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons chopped pistachios (optional)
ingredients.notes: for added texture and visual appeal

ingredients.name: 1 cup all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: used to form the crumble topping

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, melted
ingredients.notes: helps in binding and making it more crumbly

instructions: Combine crushed grapes with honey and spices. Stir until the grapes are evenly coated and most of the juice is released.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour, melted butter, and sugar. Gradually fold in chopped pistachios if using.
Fold the crumb mixture over the grape base gently to ensure it's evenly spread throughout the dish but not too mixed.
Transfer the mixture into an ovenproof serving dish or individual ramekins.
Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake for about 20-25 minutes until golden brown and crisp on top. Serve warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream if desired.
